name_en: Name: By The Way Boston Mini Bag
name_cn:
Name: By The Way Boston Mini Bag
Quality: Original Order Quality
Model: 8881
Color: Pink
Size: 17×8×12cm
Calfskin and snake skin lettering, very soft texture. Features FENDI ROMA print, hard structure, and acrylic handle with a zip closure. Large capacity with an interior pocket.
